posts.text:
Just let him be the goddamn mayor


Timmy Facciola (@TimmyFacciola_)

Zohran Mamdani on whether he supports a united Ireland:

"I gotta be honest, I haven't thought enough on that question."

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/TimmyFacciola_/status/2033608546156270059#m

He truly can’t stop winning this war. He won yesterday, and last week. Looking forward to next week’s victory, and next month’s.


Leading Report (@LeadingReport)

BREAKING: President Trump says the U.S. has defeated Iran.



— https://nitter.net/LeadingReport/status/2032921799206297786#m

Classic case of spontaneous frog boiling


Organizermemes (@OrganizerMemes)

What happened that made all these big far left accounts feel comfortable sounding like groypers all the sudden?





— https://nitter.net/OrganizerMemes/status/2032941432890069069#m

Yeah


Sinfulskin (@Sinfulskin2)

Be Honest: Did you think Trump’s Second Presidency would be this bad?



— https://nitter.net/Sinfulskin2/status/2032638701142966286#m

cinesthetic. (@TheCinesthetic)

What is a "comfort movie" of yours that most people would be surprised that you chose as being a comfort movie?



— https://nitter.net/TheCinesthetic/status/2032978333416181768#m

NEW VIDEO
On YouTube now. For free. No ads, no sponsorships, just pure uncut content.

noooo the most famous philosopher I’ve met who was not in the Epstein filesss


The Associated Press (@AP)

Jürgen Habermas, whose work on communication, rationality and sociology made him one of the world’s most influential philosophers and a key intellectual figure in his native Germany, has died. He was 96. apnews.com/article/juergen-h…




— https://nitter.net/AP/status/2032825289596645637#m
If the Ayatollah is Voldemort is that why he blocked the Strait of Horcrux? @grok is this true?
Explain the war in Iran to me like I’m a 5-year-old Gryffindor with a PhD in international relations
Also eat shit Gates, I am the superior market timer

This actually worked out pretty well for me. Thank you $TSLA Twitter for the fiduciary financial advice.


Natalie Wynn (@ContraPoints)

I might open a small short position. Wouldn’t place a big bet because it’s a gamble with timing. Irrationality, solvency, things of that nature. Check back in a couple months so one of us can gloat.



— https://nitter.net/ContraPoints/status/1990340945787912195#m
All you have to do to get a hit tweet on this platform is reopen some 17th century discourse

You need to be aware for your own safety that Protestants think this is Satanic


Anthony (@Catholicizm1)

If we did this in America every single Protestant would become Catholic. I even think every Protestant who sees the video will convert. Keep posting them.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/Catholicizm1/status/2030335759606026301#m
Ive warned you about this

Remember when Wikileaks released the “collateral murder” video? Now the White House would have edited in the “Sudden Death!” voiceover from Super Smash Bros and tweeted it out with the caption MAXIMUM LETHALITY

now this is podracing


The White House (@WhiteHouse)

UNDEFEATED.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/WhiteHouse/status/2032115039985881556#m

a parody of a parody of a hell beneath hell
